plugin.framework-gdpr.framework.name: General Data Protection Regulation
plugin.framework-gdpr.framework.descript: Starter GDPR pack with key articles for processing principles, records of processing, security, breach notification, and DPIA.
plugin.framework-gdpr.elements.gdpr-doma: Core principles that govern lawful and accountable processing.
Operational governance, records of processing, and security obligations.
Notification and response obligations for personal data breaches.
plugin.framework-gdpr.elements.gdpr-arti: Principles relating to processing of personal data
Personal data must be processed lawfully, fairly, transparently, for specified purposes, and with data minimisation, integrity, and accountability.
Controllers and processors maintain records of processing activities and supporting governance evidence.
Implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to ensure a level of security appropriate to risk.
Notification of a personal data breach to the supervisory authority
Notify relevant supervisory authorities without undue delay when reportable personal data breaches occur.
Perform DPIAs when processing is likely to result in high risk to rights and freedoms.
